description_long: This house features a modern, multi-level design with a combination of flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, and a mix of white and dark exterior finishes. The front facade is defined by a prominent entryway with steps, a small porch, and landscaped greenery, while the rear and side elevations showcase expansive lawns and outdoor seating areas. The structure includes multiple wings and sections, creating a dynamic footprint with several outdoor spaces, including patios and garden beds. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and others in grouped rows. The landscaping is well-integrated, with trees, shrubs, and manicured lawns surrounding the house. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on open, light-filled spaces.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, and landscaped surroundings. The design features clean lines, a prominent entryway, and a mix of white and dark exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, a small porch, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard, outdoor seating area, and multiple wings of the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long facade, grouped windows, and extensive lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible garden beds, trees, and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped rows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent entryway with steps, a small porch, and landscaped approach
